# (PART\*) Rectal Cancer {.unnumbered}

# RectalCa SCORE

[Rectal CA SCORE](https://www.surgicalcore.org/modulecontent.aspx?id=130244)

## Anatomy

-Venous drainge

## Presentation

-   Assessment of sphincter function

## Operative Tx

### [Total mesorectal excision](07-rectal_surgery.qmd)

### Transanal excision

### Isolated liver mets
